this will be an nmp app (../nostr-multi-platform) -- start setting up the basics -- we'll start with an ios and android app (that MUST be kept in feature-parity at all times) -- add an AGENTS.md rule like the one in nmp repo about 300/500 LOC soft/hard limit per source code file
Set up the project basics, created AGENTS.md with the 300/500 LOC limit and iOS/Android feature parity rules, and initialized the project structure for the iOS, Android, and relay apps.

git init, and ios and android should be in apps/{ios,android}

relay in apps/{relay}
Initialized git, restructured the project to place iOS, Android, and relay under the apps/ directory, and deployed the relay to the server with Caddy and systemd.
